name: Iridescence
description: Thin-film interference shader producing soap-bubble rainbow color shifts driven by mouse viewing angle.
accessibility_notes: rapid color shifting may affect photosensitive users

intensity.description: Iridescence effect strength — controls color saturation and overlay alpha

className.description: CSS class for the container or canvas element

conflicts: WebGL required — no fallback for unsupported browsers
usage_tip: Best for holographic overlay on product images or premium cards.
